section_title: Construction of "Registrar of Joint Stock Companies" in Act XXI of 1860.-- In sections I and 18 of the Societies
content:
401. Construction of "Registrar of Joint Stock Companies" in Act XXI of 1860.-- In sections I and 18 of the Societies
Registration Act, 1860 (XXI of 1860), for the registration of Literacy, Scientific and Charitable Societies, the words "Registrar
of Joint Stock Companies" shall be construed to mean the Registrar under this Act.
